seoTitle: Oonah vs Opossum Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oonah and Opossum Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oonah vs Opossum Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oonah and Opossum Bay.
heading: Oonah vs Opossum Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oonah, Tasmania and Opossum Bay, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oonah has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Opossum Bay (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oonah or Opossum Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oonah has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Opossum Bay scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oonah scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Opossum Bay scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oonah or Opossum Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oonah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
